description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest to test multiple Python versions (2.7, 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9). For each version, check out the repository, install Miniconda, create a test environment, install dependencies, run tests with coverage, and optionally upload coverage to Codecov for Python 3.8.
